acceptanceCriteria.summary: Reset script removed old demo journal data and preserved owner login admin@haccp.local.
Demo staff was replaced with 8 active users that have distinct roles and position titles; legacy demo emails are absent.
Each of the 35 active templates has exactly one journal document and each document contains meaningful seeded content via entries or populated config.
Fresh verification captured actual DB counts and TypeScript passed with no emit.

commands: ad-hoc Prisma verification query for active users and per-template coverage
ad-hoc Prisma verification query for meaningful journal content
